sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65329" key="megaqambh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγα-θαμβής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n65329.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">greatly astounded</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:488" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.488</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
